user_feedback_items.request: Fix next-version R003/R004 issues: exterior attackers must be C020/C021 beast soldiers and companion beasts, the bell emblem must be global P016 Zhaoming remnant rather than a Beast Alliance mark, and the R003 soldier must inherit E01_C024A with alive aftershock posture rather than closed corpse eyes
notes: P018 may appear only as distant attacker-side equipment or banner detail, never on the bell.

user_feedback_items.request: The R003/R004 images are spatially acceptable, but particle density is too high, realism feels cheap, and lighting differs from R001/R002; optimize both and replace the formal reference-frame images
notes: Style match target was R001/R002: reduced particle/noise density, cleaner cinematic realism, low-key storm-break sky, blackstone negative fill, restrained warm accents and physically plausible wet material highlights.
Canonical reference-frames were overwritten only after explicit user approval.
